FAQ.title: Frequently asked questions
FAQ.q1: How does the pricing optimizer work?
FAQ.a1: Our AI analyzes market data, seasonal trends, competitor pricing, and your booking history to recommend optimal nightly rates. You stay in control — review and apply suggestions with one click.
FAQ.a2: Not at all. myAdmin automates the complex parts — bank imports, categorization, and tax calculations. Everything is designed for property managers, not accountants.
FAQ.q3: What if I use other platforms besides Airbnb?
FAQ.a3: We support Airbnb and Booking.com at launch, with VRBO coming soon. You can also import data manually via CSV for other platforms.
FAQ.a4: Absolutely. We use bank-level encryption, store data in EU data centers (Amsterdam), and comply fully with GDPR. Your financial data is never shared with third parties.
FAQ.q5: Can I try before I buy?
FAQ.a5: Yes! Start with a free 2-month trial. No credit card required. Full access to all features in your plan.
FAQ.a6: When you connect your Airbnb or Booking.com account, we import your historical bookings automatically. You'll have a complete picture from day one.
FAQ.a7: myAdmin is available in Dutch and English at launch. German, French, Spanish, Italian, and Portuguese are coming soon.
FAQ.a8: All plans include email support. Professional and Enterprise plans get priority support with faster response times. We also have a knowledge base with guides and tutorials.

PricingFAQ.title: Pricing questions
PricingFAQ.q1: What happens after the 2-month free trial?
PricingFAQ.a1: You'll be asked to choose a plan. No automatic charges. Your data is kept for 30 days if you don't subscribe.
PricingFAQ.a2: Yes, upgrade or downgrade anytime. Changes take effect at the start of your next billing cycle. Pro-rated credits for upgrades.
PricingFAQ.a3: A property is a unique rental unit or a group of identical rooms. A studio apartment = 1 property. A house on both Airbnb and Booking.com = 1 property, not 2. A hotel with 30 rooms of 3 types (e.g. standard, deluxe, suite) = 3 properties, not 30.
PricingFAQ.q4: Do I need a credit card to start the trial?
PricingFAQ.a4: No. Sign up with just your email. We'll only ask for payment when you choose a plan after the trial.
PricingFAQ.q5: Is there a discount for annual billing?
PricingFAQ.a5: Yes — save 20% when you pay annually. That's 2 months free compared to monthly billing.
PricingFAQ.q6: What payment methods do you accept?
PricingFAQ.a6: Credit card (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), iDEAL, SEPA direct debit, and bank transfer (Enterprise only).
PricingFAQ.a7: Yes. No lock-in contracts. Cancel from your account settings. You keep access until the end of your billing period.
PricingFAQ.q8: What if I have more than 15 properties?
PricingFAQ.a8: Our Enterprise plan is designed for you. Contact us for custom pricing based on your portfolio size and needs.
PricingFAQ.a9: Yes. Every plan includes one free read-only accountant login. Need more? Additional accountant seats are available as an add-on.

CookieConsent.message: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyze site traffic. Essential cookies are always active. We'd also like to use analytics cookies to understand how you use our site.

CookieConsent.analyticsDescription: Help us understand how visitors use our site. Google Analytics (GA4). Data is anonymized.
CookieConsent.marketingDescription: Used to show relevant ads and measure campaigns. Not currently in use. Reserved for future use.

TermsPage.title: Terms of Service
TermsPage.subtitle: Algemene Voorwaarden
TermsPage.metaDescription: Terms of Service (Algemene Voorwaarden) for the myAdmin STR property management platform. Governed by Dutch law.
TermsPage.intro: These terms govern your use of the myAdmin platform. By creating an account, you agree to these terms.
TermsPage.def1: "Platform" — the myAdmin web application and website
TermsPage.def2: "Service" — all features provided through the Platform
TermsPage.def3: "User" / "You" — the person or entity using the Service
TermsPage.def5: "Subscription" — a paid plan granting access to the Service
TermsPage.def6: "Content" — any data, text, or files you upload to the Platform
TermsPage.def7: "Property" — a unique rental unit or group of identical rooms managed through myAdmin. A house on multiple platforms = 1 property. A hotel with rooms of 3 types = 3 properties.
TermsPage.account1: You must be 18+ and legally able to enter contracts
TermsPage.account2: You must provide accurate, complete registration information
TermsPage.account3: You are responsible for keeping your login credentials secure
TermsPage.account4: One account per person; business accounts may have multiple users under the Enterprise plan
TermsPage.account5: You must notify us immediately of unauthorized access
TermsPage.trial1: Trial period: 2 months from account creation
TermsPage.trial2: Full access to all features during trial
TermsPage.trial3: No credit card required to start
TermsPage.trial4: Trial does not automatically convert to a paid subscription
TermsPage.trial5: At trial end: choose a plan or your account becomes inactive
TermsPage.trial6: Data retained for 30 days after trial expiry, then deleted
TermsPage.trial7: One trial per person/company — abuse may result in termination
TermsPage.sub2: Plan determines property limit and feature access
TermsPage.sub4: Downgrade: takes effect at next billing cycle
TermsPage.sub5: Add-ons (extra properties, users, analytics) billed separately
TermsPage.pay1: All prices are in EUR and exclude VAT (BTW) unless stated
TermsPage.pay2: VAT is charged at the applicable Dutch/EU rate
TermsPage.pay3: Accepted methods: credit card (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), iDEAL, SEPA direct debit, bank transfer (Enterprise only)
TermsPage.pay4: Invoices issued electronically at the start of each period
TermsPage.pay5: Payment due within 14 days of invoice date
TermsPage.pay6: Late payment: statutory commercial interest rate (wettelijke handelsrente, currently ECB rate + 8%)
TermsPage.pay7: Persistent non-payment: account suspension after 30 days, termination after 60 days
TermsPage.pay8: Refunds: no refunds for partial billing periods; annual plans refundable pro-rata within first 30 days
TermsPage.data1: You retain ownership of all data you upload to myAdmin
TermsPage.data2: We process your data as described in our
TermsPage.data3: We act as "data processor" for your financial/booking data; you are the "data controller" (GDPR terminology)
TermsPage.data4: We will not sell, share, or use your data for purposes other than providing the Service
TermsPage.data5: Data storage: Account data in Railway EU West (Amsterdam, NL); Authentication in AWS Cognito EU-WEST-1 (Ireland); Documents in your own Google Drive or S3 bucket
TermsPage.data6: Data export: you can export your data at any time in standard formats (CSV, PDF)
TermsPage.data7: Data retention after contract closure: 1 year, with data export available throughout, then permanently deleted
TermsPage.data8: Documents and invoices stored on your own Google Drive or S3 are owned and controlled by you — we do not delete these
TermsPage.data9: You are responsible for retaining financial records for 7 years as required by Dutch tax law (AWR) — ensure your documents are stored in your own Google Drive or S3
TermsPage.data10: If we act as data processor, a Data Processing Agreement (Verwerkersovereenkomst) is available upon request
TermsPage.use1: Use the Service for illegal activities
TermsPage.use2: Upload malicious code or attempt to breach security
TermsPage.use3: Share your account credentials with unauthorized parties
TermsPage.use4: Reverse-engineer, scrape, or copy the Platform
TermsPage.use5: Use the Service to process data for third parties without an Enterprise plan
TermsPage.use6: Exceed your plan's property limit without upgrading
TermsPage.use7: Misrepresent your identity or property count
TermsPage.useWarning: Violation may result in immediate account suspension or termination without refund.
TermsPage.ip1: The myAdmin platform, brand, code, design, and documentation are owned by Goodwin Solutions BV and protected by Dutch and international copyright law (Auteurswet)
TermsPage.ip2: Your subscription grants a non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the Service for your business purposes
TermsPage.ip3: You may not sublicense, resell, or white-label the Service without an Enterprise agreement
TermsPage.ip4: Feedback and suggestions you provide may be used by us to improve the Service without obligation or compensation
TermsPage.liability1: myAdmin is a tool to assist with financial administration; it does NOT replace professional tax or accounting advice
TermsPage.liability2: You are responsible for verifying the accuracy of tax declarations and financial reports generated by the Platform
TermsPage.liability3: Our total liability is limited to the amount you paid in the 12 months preceding the claim
TermsPage.liability6: Tax penalties resulting from incorrect filings
TermsPage.liability7: Data loss due to circumstances beyond our control
TermsPage.liabilityDutchLaw: These limitations apply to the maximum extent permitted by Dutch law (Article 6:233 BW for general terms).
TermsPage.liabilityExclusion: Nothing in these terms excludes liability for gross negligence (grove schuld) or willful misconduct (opzet).
TermsPage.warranty1: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available"
TermsPage.warranty2: We aim for 99.5% uptime but do not guarantee uninterrupted service
TermsPage.warranty3: Scheduled maintenance will be communicated in advance
TermsPage.warranty4: We do not warrant that the Service will meet all your specific requirements
TermsPage.warranty5: AI-powered features (pricing recommendations, invoice processing) are assistive tools — results should be verified
TermsPage.termYou1: Cancel anytime from your account settings
TermsPage.termYou2: Access continues until end of current billing period
TermsPage.termYou4: Data export available for 30 days after cancellation
TermsPage.termUs1: We may terminate for breach of these terms (with notice)
TermsPage.termUs2: We may terminate immediately for serious violations (fraud, security breach, illegal use)
TermsPage.termUs3: If we discontinue the Service: 90 days notice + pro-rated refund + data export period
TermsPage.termAfter1: Data retained for 1 year after contract closure, with export available throughout
TermsPage.termAfter2: After 1 year: account data permanently deleted from Railway and Cognito
TermsPage.termAfter3: Documents on your Google Drive / S3 are unaffected — you own and control those
TermsPage.termAfter4: You are responsible for 7-year financial record retention (Dutch tax law) via your own storage
TermsPage.changes1: We may modify these terms with 30 days written notice (email + in-app notification)
TermsPage.changes2: Material changes require explicit acceptance on next login
TermsPage.changes3: Continued use after the notice period constitutes acceptance
TermsPage.changes4: If you disagree: you may terminate your account before the changes take effect, with pro-rated refund
TermsPage.law1: These terms are governed by the laws of the Netherlands
TermsPage.law3: EU consumer protection regulations apply where applicable
TermsPage.law4: In case of conflict between language versions, the Dutch version prevails
TermsPage.dispute1: We prefer to resolve disputes amicably — contact us first
TermsPage.dispute2: If unresolved within 30 days: mediation through a certified Dutch mediator (MfN-registered)
TermsPage.dispute3: If mediation fails: exclusive jurisdiction of the competent court in Amsterdam
TermsPage.dispute4: For EU consumers: you may also use the EU Online Dispute Resolution platform (https://ec.europa.eu/odr)

PrivacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.metaDescription: How myAdmin collects, uses, and protects your personal data. GDPR-compliant privacy policy for our STR property management platform.
PrivacyPage.intro: We take your privacy seriously. This policy explains what data we collect, why, and what rights you have.
PrivacyPage.whoWeAreText: myAdmin is operated by Goodwin Solutions BV, registered in the Netherlands under KvK number 24352408.
PrivacyPage.legalBasis1: Contract performance — to create and manage your account
PrivacyPage.legalBasis2: Legitimate interest — to improve our service, prevent fraud
PrivacyPage.legalBasis3: Consent — for analytics cookies and marketing emails
PrivacyPage.legalBasis4: Legal obligation — tax and financial record-keeping
PrivacyPage.cookieNote: Essential cookies are always active. Analytics cookies require your consent via the cookie banner.
PrivacyPage.thirdPartyNote: All third-party services are GDPR-compliant and process data within the EU/EEA, or under Standard Contractual Clauses.
PrivacyPage.storage3Location: User-owned Google Drive or S3 buckets
PrivacyPage.storage3Retention: Owned and managed by the user
PrivacyPage.storageNote1: All data stored within the EU (Netherlands and Ireland)
PrivacyPage.storageNote2: Trial data: retained 30 days after trial expires if not converted to paid, then deleted
PrivacyPage.storageNote3: After contract closure: data retained for 1 year with export available, then permanently deleted
PrivacyPage.storageNote4: Financial records: user is responsible for 7-year retention (Dutch tax law) via their own Google Drive / S3 storage
PrivacyPage.storageNote5: Data export available at any time from account settings
PrivacyPage.rightsIntro: Under GDPR, you have the following rights:
PrivacyPage.right_access_desc: Request a copy of your data
PrivacyPage.right_port_desc: Export your data in a common format
PrivacyPage.right_restrict_desc: Limit how we process your data
PrivacyPage.rightsContact: To exercise any of these rights, email
PrivacyPage.rightsComplaint: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Autoriteit Persoonsgegevens (Dutch Data Protection Authority).
PrivacyPage.childrenText: myAdmin is a business tool not intended for use by anyone under 18. We do not knowingly collect data from minors.
PrivacyPage.changesText: We may update this policy from time to time. Significant changes will be communicated via email or an in-app notice. The "last updated" date at the top reflects the latest revision.
